channel.title: Infective vs effective thinking on Betzalel's writings
channel.description: Recent content in Infective vs effective thinking on Betzalel's writings

item.title: Introduction
item.description: This group of essays started out as “intellectually slandering” the modern American left specifically because I see the infection spreading to my country (Israel). I was going to make a mega essay on that subject but then realized I’d just be falling into the hands of whoever engineered this reality and decided to make a bunch of essays based on infective and effective thinking which is similar to Daniel Kahneman’s thinking fast and slow except for the part where one could be used as psychological warfare by (in Kahneman’s terminology) making people use their “system 1” thinking (emotional but fast). while the other one acts as a shield by learning how to use your “system 2” thinking (slower but more logical).

item.title: Chapter 1. The Infectious Disease of the Modern Left
Chapter 2. Demonizing Institutions and Normalizing the Unnormalized
item.description:
Demonizing Institutions and Normalizing the Unnormalized

The modern left often portrays the state (or traditional institutions) as inherently oppressive or evil—e.g., “defund the police,” systemic racism baked into government, or viewing borders/national sovereignty as xenophobic. This demonization flips traditional good/evil: what was once normal (law enforcement, merit-based systems, national identity) becomes “oppressive,” while unchecked empathy or radical change becomes “justice.”

item.title: Chapter 3. Truth versus Ideals and Religion as a Vaccine
item.description:
Focus: Truth/ideals metaphors + full vaccine antidote + ancient cults parallel + forced religion note. (Closes the series with solution.)

Key Content / Chapters:

  • Truth versus Ideals Plato’s Cave: shadows (feelings, self-ID, ideals) mistaken for reality; Left attacks sunlight (biology, evidence, tradition). Effective thinking escapes; infective thinking chains everyone. Pokémon Black and White: Reshiram (truth) vs. Zekrom (ideals) in conflict — the Left demands ideals as the only truth.
  • Religion as a Vaccine Ancient cults (Asherah ritual sex; Baal/Molech child sacrifice for “prosperity”) parallel modern one-night-stand culture + abortion-as-convenience. Biblical response restores moral order. In Snow Crash, a neuro-linguistic virus crashes minds like Sumerian programs. Juanita (after Jesuits) explains the brain’s immune system strengthens with exposure — traditional religion builds mental antibodies (humility, boundaries, evidence-based tradition) as the nam-shub counter-virus against fictions (fluid identity, affirmation over desistance, “better” non-bio parenting). Faith inoculates by anchoring reality over utopia. Forcing religion (or woke “everyone their own reality” cult) backfires and breeds resentment. Voluntary faith works; coercion strengthens the virus.

Cross-reference: “Building on the moral inversions in Essay 2 and empathy failures in the related essay below.”
